# Docs Instructions

- Before editing project documentation, read `README.md`, `doc/policy.md`, and the relevant `doc/spec*` or `doc/dev-plan*` files.
- Keep README focused on project overview, local development assumptions, and document navigation unless explicitly asked for more.
- Do not add production-environment details unless explicitly requested.
- Avoid creating overlapping documents when an existing source-of-truth file should be updated instead.
- When implementation changes affect behavior or assumptions, update the corresponding spec or plan document.
